title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer—use any Ollama model as an LLM, chat, or embeddings backend in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) that supports chat, RAG, multimodal, and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama—chat, generate, pull models, and stream responses in JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama—simple interface to chat, complete, and manage local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built rich CLI wrapper with interactive chat, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama—use local models for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to plug Ollama models into no-code workflows for chat, completion, and embedding steps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET SDK for Ollama—chat, stream, and manage models in dotnet apps.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and autoscaling support.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-dependent code.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration library to inject Ollama chat/embedding clients as beans.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama—chat, generate, pull, and stream with idiomatic Go APIs.
